title: Live model catalog across the ecosystem
summary:
Hardcoded model lists are dead; dashboards and SDKs now fetch the live catalog dynamically.

Hardcoded model lists are a relic. The Enter dashboard, public site, SDK, and MCP server now pull directly from the live `/models` endpoint. When a new model is deployed, it instantly appears in your dashboard tables and API key settings. No more waiting for a frontend bump to see what's new.
